name: Nogales Recreation Center
description: Nogales Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Nogales, AZ. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Tubac Pickleball Club
description: Tubac Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Tubac, AZ. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
